## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, examples, example_test.go) if behavior changed

- [ ] Safety contract docs updated if caller responsibilities changed
